name: Advance America
description_short: Advance America offers payday loans ($100–$500), installment loans (up to $1,000), and title loans (up to $25,000) with same-day funding at physical locations and online.
description_long:
Advance America is a nationally recognized lender specializing in short-term emergency cash solutions. The company operates multiple physical store locations, including the Jacksonville, FL branch at 1020-14 N. Edgewood Ave., and serves millions of customers seeking quick access to funds. The company emphasizes accessibility and speed, positioning itself as a trusted provider for people facing immediate financial gaps.

Advance America offers three primary loan products: Payday Loans (2–4 week terms, $100–$500), Installment Loans (longer repayment terms, $100–$1,000), and Title Loans (vehicle-collateralized loans up to $25,000 in partnership with LoanCenter). All three products are available both online and in-store, with the company advertising same-day personal loans up to $1,000. The Jacksonville location is open extended hours (9 a.m.–6 p.m. most days, 9 a.m.–4 p.m. Sundays) and offers bilingual customer service.

Advance America differentiates itself through multi-product offerings, national recognition, and in-store customer service. The company emphasizes trained staff who explain loan options and help customers choose appropriate products. Customer reviews on the website show a 4.9 out of 5 rating based on 125,497 reviews. The company also offers Western Union services at physical locations and operates a referral rewards program.

However, consumers should recognize that Advance America operates in the high-cost short-term lending space. While the website provides product descriptions and eligibility requirements (government ID, proof of income, checking account, SSN/ITIN), it does not disclose APRs, fees, or total cost comparisons. Payday loans and title loans are inherently expensive forms of credit and can create debt cycles if not carefully managed. This lender is most appropriate for genuine emergencies when no other options exist, not as a regular financial solution.
pros: Same-day or next-day funding available for loans up to $1,000
Multiple loan products (payday, installment, title) in one location
Extended store hours (9 a.m.–6 p.m. weekdays, 9 a.m.–4 p.m. Saturdays)
Installment loans offer larger amounts ($100–$1,000) and longer repayment terms than payday loans
Title loans available up to $25,000 for vehicle owners
4.9/5 customer rating with 125,497+ reviews on Google
cons: No APR, fees, or cost details disclosed on the website; consumers must call or visit in-store to learn actual rates
Payday and title loans are high-cost credit products that can trap borrowers in debt cycles
Title loans require putting a vehicle at risk of repossession as collateral
Limited loan amounts for payday loans ($100–$500) may not cover larger emergencies
No mention of income verification standards, making qualification criteria unclear
best_for: Workers facing a genuine 1–2 week cash shortage before their next paycheck
Vehicle owners with immediate emergency expenses who have no other borrowing options
Consumers who need flexible repayment terms and can qualify for installment loans instead of payday loans
Bilingual Spanish speakers seeking accessible in-person lending with customer support
diagnosis: Advance America is best for workers with genuine short-term cash emergencies (1–2 weeks) who have exhausted other options and need speed over cost efficiency. The primary caveat is that APRs and fees are not disclosed on the website; borrowers must contact the company directly to understand true costs before committing, and these products carry substantially higher costs than traditional credit.
